design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed = hash(title + kind + audience + generated_at) -> selected architecture = workflow-command-center. AIDA Check: Attention (command-center hero), Interest (proof + market context), Desire (workflow playbook + media), Action (CTA band). Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk primary. Hero Math Verification: clamp headline max-width ensures 2–3 lines on desktop. Bento Density Verification: gapless grid-auto-flow:dense confirmed. GSAP Motion Selection: pinned-chapter-scroll + hover-physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: black pill primary CTA, white secondary CTA, contrast verified.
headline: Super for ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin

site_brief.audience: ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin AI assistant
ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin

summary: A premium niche landing page for ecommerce operators who live inside order queues, support inboxes, and repetitive admin. Shows how Super’s personal AI agents can operate real apps, reuse a computer-use cache, and reduce the grind of repeated workflows—grounded in current market evidence and a practical field guide.
